description: Returns model space vector of the object airplane or helicopter [[A3_Targeting_config_reference#class_pilotCamera|pilotCamera]] .
name: getPilotCameraDirection

ret.desc: relative to the model centre (In a similar fashion to [[Position#PositionRelative|PositionRelative]]). Returns [0,0,0] if object has no [[A3_Targeting_config_reference#class_pilotCamera|pilotCamera]].
